claim_scope: finite exact consecutive-cycle carry rows in the displayed schedule and cycle box; only an all-q zero tail would construct a nonterminating execution. A nonzero full-ternary-divisibility row is only one lifted finite link and does not stitch to its neighbors without additional equality.
theorem_interface: Proposed QM121: for p(q)=U(q)-m(q)>0, bare-schedule canonical future consistency defines r_(q+1)-y_q=2^p(q) C_q. Every genuine period-three ray has eventual C_q=0 after the sharp core bound. The research-side converse says an eventual exact-zero carry tail, together with the audited three-step replay, splices into an infinite positive EC17 ray. The exact full predecessor screen is 3^Q | C_q; if also |C_q|<3^Q, it forces C_q=0.
